sanskrit:
ये चैव सात्त्विका भावा राजसास्तामसाश्च ये।
मत्त एवेति तान्विद्धि न त्वहं तेषु ते मयि॥
transliteration: ye caiva sāttvikā bhāvā rājasās tāmasāś ca ye | matta eveti tān viddhi na tv ahaṁ teṣu te mayi ||
literal_meaning: All states of being—goodness, passion, or ignorance—are manifested by My energy. Know them to be from Me; yet I am not in them, nor are they in Me.
contextual_meaning: Every mood, thought, or impulse you experience—calm, driven, or foggy—originates from a single deeper source, but that source remains untouched by any mood. Identifying with the witness rather than the mood ends the cycle of being hijacked by it.
psychological_state: Shift from fusion with emotional states to meta-cognitive awareness; the birth of the internal observer.
trigger_scenario: You snap at your child, then watch the anger as a passing cloud rather than ‘my anger’—instantly loosening its grip.
anchor_text: Watch every mood pass; you are the untouched sky, not the passing cloud.
